name: ASTROSMASH 1981
short_description: In this retro arcade hit, you control a laser gun and have to shoot asteroids, bombs and other objects to collect points and ensure your survival
detailed_description: At last!  ASTROSMASH, the 1981 million-seller for the Intellivision console, is now available in its original version on Steam. In this retro arcade hit, you control a laser gun and have to shoot asteroids, bombs and other objects to collect points and ensure your survival. The game combines elements from Asteroids and Space Invaders, but offers its own unique style. As well as the original version, there's also a fantastic remake on Steam that brings the nostalgic action back to life with modern graphics and gameplay - perfect for retro fans and new players alike!
